feed.title: App Store Discounts（US）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:49753370488353792+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008699750812672+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 1936 201 1735 82
US 1792 176 1616 65

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(US)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: Kingdom Rush Vengeance TD Game
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Hero Tank：$5.99 → $3.99 [$3.99 ~ $5.99]

All Price Information

Price：$4.99

In-App Purchases

  • Tower War Zepelling：$4.99
  • Tower Wicked Sisters：$2.99
  • Tower Swamp Monster：$2.99
  • Tower Ignis Altar：$0.99
  • Tower Shaolin Temple：$0.99
  • Tower Rotten Forest：$0.99
  • Tower Blazing Watcher：$2.99
  • Tower Deep Devils Reef：$0.99
  • Hero Tank：$3.99
  • Hero Tramin：$2.99

Application Description

Get ready to jump into action and show the Kingdom who’s the real boss in the best tower defense game! Face empires of mighty enemies. Clash against supreme bosses, unlocking and switching to new towers. Train legendary heroes and get all the achievements using your strategy in this amazing TD game. Kingdom Rush Vengeance will give you hours and hours of gameplay in the best tower defense game available! Heroes, your Army, Enemies, and legendary td bossfights! - 17 Powerful HEROES who will, without hesitation, rush into action at your command - LEVEL UP YOUR HEROES and upgrade their abilities - 10+ TRINKETS AND ARTEFACTS for that extra action in battle. - NEW POWERS AND REINFORCEMENTS to vanquish your foes, td style! - 30 UPGRADES to train your army to their best form. - 60+ DEADLY ENEMIES that will put all of your wit and strategic skills to the test - RUSH TO SAVE THE KINGDOM as you bring down 6 mighty bosses in the most legendary boss fights! Epic Selection of Towers and Upgrades - 22 NEW TOWERS to defend your kingdom - UNIQUE ABILITIES AND SPECIAL POWER for every tower - Choose your arsenal of towers and execute your strategy. Create devastating combinations of towers, abilities and special powers to stop your enemies! Near Endless Tower Defense Gameplay - 42 CHALLENGING STAGES that will test your skills - 9 DIFFERENT REALMS to conquer and explore - EXPLORE new lands in the Kingdom - 60+ ACHIEVEMENTS, hidden secrets, and fun stuff for you to play and discover while you explore the realm! - UNLOCK HEROIC AND IRON CHALLENGES on all stages - CASUAL, NORMAL, VETERAN OR IMPOSSIBLE difficulty for every level - Summon enemy waves faster to earn additional gold Time for some Royal Vengeance in the Kingdom! Vez’nan, the powerful almighty wizard has returned. Lead your powerful dark army and make the Kingdom tremble with each step. Help Vez’nan conquer new lands in the kingdom! Orcs, goblins, demons, dark knights, zombies, and many more! Choose your favorites and mix them to find the most deadly tower defense combination - secure the crown of the kingdom for Vez’nan. Awesome Offline Tower Defense Game No Wi-Fi at your Dark Tower? - PLAY ANYWHERE - playing offline works, if your wifi doesn’t - PLAY OFFLINE - no internet connection required - You can play Kingdom Rush Vengeance as your offline TD game of choice. -------------------------------------------------- HEARD ON THE MEDIA: "For veteran Kingdom Rush players and newcomers alike, the charm and strategy of the franchise remains with Kingdom Rush: Vengeance, making it one of the best mobile games of 2018!" -Polygon "Kingdom Rush Vengeance is the biggest and baddest the series has been." -148Apps "Players with any affinity for tower-defense games are going to enjoy every second they spend with Kingdom Rush Vengeance!" -Pocket gamer "The game is intensely engaging with a light-hearted tone that makes it a real pleasure to jump into." -Pocket tactics Get Lord Vez’nan’s latest news here: https://www.kingdomrushvengeance.com/ Terms and Conditions: https://www.ironhidegames.com/TermsOfService Privacy Policy: https://www.ironhidegames.com/PrivacyPolicy Video creators, podcast creators, and streamers: We would love to see your content on Youtube and Twitch! We support and promote channel creators so, if you want us to showcase your videos or want to know more about our games, feel free to write to us to contact@ironhidegames.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Cello Tuner Professional
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Tuning Fork：$1.99 → $0.00 [$0.00 ~ $3.99]

All Price Information

Price：$12.99

In-App Purchases

  • Tuning Fork：$0.00
  • Settings：$1.99

Application Description

Tune your cello instantly with precision and ease! Optimal for beginners, intermediate and advanced musicians! · The most accurate - displays the exact sound frequency in Hz. · Calibration for A: 392Hz, 415Hz, 432Hz, 440Hz, 441Hz, 442Hz, 443Hz, 444Hz, 466Hz. · Instant load and fastest tuning! - Optimized for latest devices. · Highest responsiveness and sensitivity. · Intuitive user interface with LED tuning indicator. · Visual indicators - tuned string lights up. · Universal app - works with iPhone, iPad and iPod touch. · Advanced settings (A4 calibration, Mic sensitivity, Sound notifications) and Tuning fork! (as in-app purchases) What our users say: "Does what it promises - Very useful app." "This app makes tuning so easy!" "By far the greatest and most accurate cello tuning app. Play the string, read its chart and you know whether you're in tune." "Amazing! Outstanding, well spent money! "All cellists should have this app!" "It's very useful for me! Thank you!" "Excellent app" "Very convenient software. Suitable for any skill!" --- Please make sure to allow microphone access to this app when prompted. Check it under Settings>Privacy>Microphone. Thank you. --- Got ideas? Questions? Please send us your feedback through our site or to feedback@daikyoujulabs.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Little Big Workshop
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$9.99 → $1.99 [$1.99 ~ $9.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$1.99

Application Description

Imagine a magical factory, appearing right in your living room. A carefully planned masterpiece, where diligent workers throw together anything customers want. Rubber ducks and dressers, drones and electric guitars, scooters and other wonderful goods can be created from many different materials and sold for hard cash – cash you invest right back into your factory to get more machines, more workers and grow your business. In Little Big Workshop you become a factory tycoon! Real factories - made FUN You are the Big Boss and it’s time to take charge of your very own tabletop factory. Organize the factory floor, manage your workers, purchase machinery, and design efficient production lines - all within the time-limit and to your client's satisfaction! An open-ended sandbox-experience Take it easy, it’s a sandbox-experience where you think, ponder and poke at things until you get it to work the way you’d like. Supply products to clients and an ever-changing market, as you produce over 50 unique product types, built from multiple parts and pieces - all of which can be created with different materials and production methods. No two factories should ever look the same. Tiny hands, big dreams Start out with just a small workshop and expand to a desk-filling factory. Unlock ever fancier machines, add even more production methods, and most of all, more room. Soon enough you’ll be running multiple production lines, producing hundreds of advanced products each day, and watching with joy as your cute workers do the actual work. Features: - Varying industries and a wide range of products - Focus on practical problems, not on values, economics, or logistics - Organize all steps of the production on a blueprint - Factories grow as you unlock more desk space - Fully simulated Day/Night-cycle - Take care of your workers! Work them too hard and they drop like flies - Cute model-town art-style

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: All In One Memo
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$3.99 → Free [Free ~ $3.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Keep the words, pictures, videos, voice and positions you want to record at any time and anywhere. And there are reminders that you can never forget.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Notteka | AI Meeting Notes
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$0.99 → $0.29 [$0.29 ~ $0.99]）

All Price Information

Price：$0.29

In-App Purchases

  • Monthly subscription：$12.49

Application Description

Notteka is an AI-powered meeting assistant that makes capturing, transcribing, and summarizing meetings effortless. Key Features: 【Real-Time Transcription】 Tap to record and watch AI convert speech to text in real time. Supports Cantonese, Mandarin, English, and Japanese — perfect for multilingual meetings. 【AI-Powered Summaries】 After your meeting, AI generates structured summaries automatically. Choose from multiple templates to extract key points, action items, and decisions. 【Import Audio & Video】 Import existing audio or video files from your device or other apps. Notteka transcribes them automatically — turn any recording into searchable text. 【AI Chat Assistant】 Ask questions about your meeting content. Quickly find key information, follow up on details, and interact with your notes through natural conversation. 【Smart Organization】 - Meetings automatically grouped by time - Search, edit, share, and copy with ease - Folder-based organization to keep everything tidy 【Multilingual Interface】 App interface available in English, Simplified Chinese, Cantonese, and Japanese. Whether it's work meetings, lectures, interviews, or brainstorming sessions — Notteka is your intelligent meeting companion.

entry.title: Computer Basics: PC Guide
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：$0.99 → Free [Free ~ $4.99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

The application contains a variety of articles and tips for anyone who works with computer technology or is simply interested in it. It is divided into three sections: 1. Hardware 2. PC assembly 3. Software The Hardware section contains information about all computer components, peripherals, and other equipment. The basic theory of computer parts is explained in simple language. Here you will find articles about% the motherboard, central processor, RAM, graphics card, and other hardware. Hardware topics include: • Motherboard, central processing unit, random access memory, power supply unit, graphics card, optical disk drive, sound card, cooling systems, computer cases • Hard disk drives (HDD), solid-state drives (SSD), optical disks, USB flash drives • Keyboards, mice, webcams, microphones, image scanners • Monitors, speakers, headphones, printers, projectors • Network interface controllers, routers, mobile broadband modems • Gaming devices, uninterruptible power supplies, peripheral connectors The PC assembly section offers step-by-step guides and illustrated instructions on how to build your own computer or replace its components. Detailed diagrams and pictures will help you understand how to assemble a PC, install or upgrade equipment, and fit components. PC assembly topics include: • Motherboard installation • CPU installation • Applying and replacing thermal paste • Installing a graphics card, RAM modules, power supply, air cooling system, sound card, SSD, or HDD The Software section provides information about computer operating systems and the basic programs that most PC users work with. Software topics include: • Operating systems • Essential programs This application is ideal for anyone who wants to improve or refresh their knowledge of computer technology. After completing the course, you will be able to assemble your own computer or upgrade it confidently. The app contains more than 50 articles and includes a search function for terms and definitions. We regularly update the course on computer fundamentals. You can also report errors or suggest improvements.
